pageContext.name: Wolverine  Miniature
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present this minified version of the fan-favorite Wolverine, casting the temperamental mutant in fine pewter at a much smaller size, but preserving the meticulous. Claws out and teeth grinding, Wolverine primes for a berserker barrage attack against his long-time nemesis Omega Red.  Royal Selangor has painstakingly reproduced Wolverine's claws, costume, and expression in fine detail, despite its miniature size. Being just over 2 inches tall, this miniature gives collectors a chance to own their very own fun-sized Logan.  The Wolverine Miniature Pewter Collectible comes boxed in a sleek black box featuring a large window for collectors that just want to keep it in mint condition.
